title: Agents
subtitle: Define agents, attach skills, shape workflows, and manage how they operate in the business.
gatewayWarning: Gateway service is not running. Agent/channel changes may take a moment to apply.

createDialog.title: Add Agent
createDialog.description: Define the role type, business goal, and role statement first, then decide whether to inherit the main agent workspace bootstrap files.
createDialog.objectivePlaceholder: Describe the business result this agent should ultimately deliver.
createDialog.rolePlaceholder: Describe who this agent is, who it serves, and what work it owns.
createDialog.inheritWorkspaceDescription: Copy SOUL.md, AGENTS.md, etc. from the main agent

specialist.label: Specialist
specialist.description: Focused on one domain and responsible for high-quality expert output.

executor.label: Executor
executor.description: Strong at calling skills and systems to complete well-defined actions.

coordinator.label: Coordinator
coordinator.description: Breaks down work, delegates to downstream agents, and consolidates results.

deleteDialog.title: Delete Agent
deleteDialog.message: Delete "{{name}}" from {{appName}}? This permanently deletes the agent and its {{appName}}-managed workspace, runtime, and session files from disk.

settingsDialog.title: {{name}} Settings
settingsDialog.description: Update the agent name and manage which channels belong to this agent.
settingsDialog.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe what this agent owns, who it serves, and what outcomes it should deliver.
settingsDialog.objectivePlaceholder: Describe the end result and deliverable this agent is expected to achieve.
settingsDialog.boundariesPlaceholder: Define when the agent must clarify, hand off, or stop instead of guessing.
settingsDialog.outputContractPlaceholder: Define the expected format, structure, and quality bar of the final output.
settingsDialog.modelProviderEmpty: No provider accounts configured. Add one in Settings → AI Providers.
settingsDialog.modelOverrideDescription: Select provider and model ID for this agent.
settingsDialog.unsavedChangesMessage: You have unsaved changes. If you close now, your changes will be discarded.
settingsDialog.channelsDescription: This shows which channels currently route to the agent. Configure account login, bindings, and routing rules in the Channels page.
settingsDialog.channelsManagedInChannels: This agent is linked to channel types. Manage exact account bindings in the Channels page.
settingsDialog.noChannels: No channels are assigned to this agent yet.
settingsDialog.skillsDescription: Choose which skills this agent can call so it can do real work, not just chat.
settingsDialog.skillsSearchPlaceholder: Search by name, description, or ID
settingsDialog.skillsEmpty: No skills are available yet. Install or enable skills in the Skills page first.
settingsDialog.skillsNoMatch: No matching skills found. Try a different keyword.
settingsDialog.workflowDescription: Use lightweight steps to define how this agent receives input, invokes capabilities, and delivers output.
settingsDialog.workflowTemplatesDescription: Start from a common flow, then tailor the steps to your business.

support.label: Support agent
support.description: Good for inbound support, presales, and human handoff.
steps: Receive the incoming message and identify the user's intent
Use attached skills to look up customer or order details
Generate a clear response with the current model
Escalate to a human and keep the context when needed

ops.label: Ops briefing
ops.description: Good for scheduled summaries, daily reports, and monitoring updates.
steps: Collect the key business data for the day
Use data skills to produce a structured summary
Turn the result into an operator-friendly briefing
Send it to the target channel and archive the result

research.label: Research analyst
research.description: Good for synthesis, competitor scans, and recommendation output.
steps: Receive the research topic and break down the questions
Use search or file skills to gather source material
Summarize findings and evidence with the current model
Output conclusions, risks, and recommended next steps

multiAgent.label: Multi-agent collaboration
multiAgent.description: Good for a coordinator agent delegating work to specialist agents and skills.
steps: Receive the business goal and turn it into a standard task brief
Call a downstream agent for specialist processing
Use a skill to validate the intermediate result and enrich data
Use the current model to consolidate the final business answer

settingsDialog.workflowStepPlaceholder: Step {{index}}, for example: Read customer profile and extract key fields
settingsDialog.workflowStepModelRefDescription: Optional. Use a different model for this step without changing the agent default.
settingsDialog.workflowInputSpecPlaceholder: Describe the input contract for this step and the expected fields.
settingsDialog.workflowOutputSpecPlaceholder: Describe the output contract this step should return to the next step.
settingsDialog.workflowCodePlaceholder: Optional. Add a script snippet, prompt template, or execution note.
settingsDialog.workflowCodeDescription: Useful for step-level prompts, templates, or code snippets.

instruction.label: Instruction
instruction.description: Use this for prep work, routing logic, or general operating guidance.

skill.label: Skill call
skill.description: Explicitly invoke an attached skill in this step.

model.label: Model call
model.description: Use a model here for generation, summarization, or reasoning.

channel.label: Channel output
channel.description: Send the result to a bound channel or account.

agent.label: Agent call
agent.description: Hand the current context to another agent so the workflow can collaborate across specialists.

workflowTargetPlaceholders.model: Enter the model ID to use

continue.label: Continue
continue.description: Proceed to the next step even if this one fails.

retry.label: Retry
retry.description: Retry this step first when the model or integration is flaky.

handoff.label: Handoff
handoff.description: Stop the automated flow and hand off to a human or supervising agent.

settingsDialog.runtimeDescription: Define how this agent is triggered and review its recent operating activity.

manual.label: Manual
manual.description: Best for starting chats, testing, or launching one-off tasks from the console.

channel.label: Channel message
channel.description: Triggers automatically when a new message arrives from a bound channel.

schedule.label: Scheduled
schedule.description: Runs from Cron or scheduled jobs on a fixed cadence.

webhook.label: Webhook
webhook.description: Starts from external callbacks or business events.

settingsDialog.runtimeRecentDescription: A quick view of the latest sessions for this agent so you can tell whether it is actively working.
settingsDialog.runtimeRecentEmpty: No recent activity yet. Once this agent starts taking work, the recent sessions will appear here.
settingsDialog.pendingStudioChanges: This agent definition has unsaved changes. Save it before closing.
settingsDialog.studioSavedHint: Studio definitions sync to OpenClaw config and the agent workspace.

removeChannelDialog.title: Remove Channel
removeChannelDialog.message: Remove {{name}} from {{appName}}? This deletes the current channel configuration.

toast.agentModelInvalid: Model must be in provider/model format
